violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (veggie slicers) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicers were moved to the 3-bay sink to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

The door to the outside, located in the receiving area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2024

The door to the walk-in cooler remains in poor repair. The hinges and latch do not close the door properly. Walk-in door must be repaired. In addition, the gaskets of the lowboy units are splitting away from the doors and must be replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023

The floor in the mop sink area and in areas of the kitchen remains in poor repair. Tiles are cracked and grouting has receded below tile level in areas. Tiles are missing under the 3-bay sink as well. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2023
